title: 10-material perturbation-augmented robust H/M sorting
reuse_for: report tables; main accuracy claim; baseline for later extension
claim: Main positive result: robust 10-material H/M separation under held-out perturbations.

title: v6 skeptical shortcut audit
primary_metric: controls weak; exact cross-split feature hash overlap absent
claim: No simple count/lineage/hash shortcut explains the v6 positive result.

title: 20-material relaxed ensemble extension
primary_metric: stress top-1 = 0.9958; stress macro-F1 = 0.9958; stress H/M min recall = 0.9167; worst-profile H/M = 0.75
reuse_for: extension table; scalability claim with caveat; future model comparison
claim: Extension result: 20-material sorting remains strong with explicit hard-negative caveat.

title: 20-material reporting-grade gate
primary_metric: reporting gate passed; strict hard-negative gate not passed
claim: A reporting-grade gate passes when strict hard-negative robustness is treated as a limitation, not a veto.

title: Strict Hematite-Ilmenite hard-negative robustness
primary_metric: strict stress worst-profile H/M = 0.5 in original v8 main gate; relaxed ensemble improves to 0.75
reuse_for: limitations; future work motivation; hard-negative benchmark
claim: Strict hard-negative robustness remains unresolved under held-out stress.

title: Hematite-Ilmenite hard-negative diagnostics
primary_metric: Hematite->Ilmenite errors and nearest-centroid collapse under stress profiles
reuse_for: v9 feature design; discussion section; ablation target selection
claim: The failure is material-space/feature robustness, not simple count/lineage/hash leakage.

title: v8 20-material event-to-feature table
reuse_for: v9 features; model comparison; diagnostic plots
claim: Primary reusable feature dataset for 20-material derivative research.

title: v6 10-material event-to-feature table
reuse_for: main result reproduction; baseline model comparison
claim: Primary reusable feature dataset for the 10-material main result.

title: Geant4 input matrix directories
claim: Experiment design and Geant4 replay entry points.
